caption:
10 Things to Do in Chiang Mai, Thailand🇹🇭

I had an amazing time exploring Chiang Mai and these are some of the highlights✨@tourismthailand

1.Tuk-tuk sightseeing tour by Lomo EV (including Wat Chedi Luang, Three Kings Monument) 🛺
2.Thai traditional dress dinner cruise by Thippayanjitr at Anantara Chiang Mai Resort 📸@Anantara_chiangmai
3.Horse trail riding at Pong Horse Park 🐎@ponghorsepark 
4.Rose tea workshop and afternoon tea at Sahrey Chanta Organic🌸
5.Meditation session and Qi Gong class at Aleenta Retreat Chiang Mai 🧘‍♀️ @aleentaretreatchiangmai 
6.Traditional lunch at Baan Landai Fine Cuisine restaurant (Michelin Guide recommended)🌿@baan_landai
7.Zira Spa treatment: Royal Thai Lanna massage 🪷@ziraspa_chiangmai 8.Lunch at Kiti Panit heritage restaurant 🍛@kitipanit 
9.Artisan flower hairpin workshop at Kalm Village 🎨@kalm_village 
10.Dinner tasting menu at Friend’s Table (Michelin Guide recommended)👨‍🍳@friendstable.cnx

Explore Chiang Mai’s most relaxing and inspiring experiences 🌸🧘‍♀️ From gourmet dining to meditative retreats, each moment is designed to nourish body and soul, reflecting the elegance of Lanna culture✈️✨
